questions: FUP er por speed koto thake?
night e ki unlimited data thake?
FUP te speed slow hoye jay
peak hour e data usage limit ache?
torrent download e ki data limit ache?
answers: ISP Digital er shob plan e TRUE unlimited data ache — kono FUP ba data cap nai! Apni joto khushi toto use korun, speed komano hobe na. Eta amader promise!
FUP (Fair Usage Policy) mane ekta certain amount data use korar por speed komiye dewa hoy. Kintu ISP Digital te kono FUP nai — amra genuinely unlimited data provide kori!
Amader unlimited mane TRULY unlimited — no hidden cap, no FUP, no throttling. ISP Digital er 'unlimited' e kono asterisk nai. Joto download korun, joto stream korun!
Data usage check korte ISP Digital app e 'My Usage' section e jan. Daily, weekly, ar monthly usage graph dekhte parben. Real-time usage monitoring feature ache!
Throttling mane intentionally speed komiye dewa — ISP Digital eta kore na! Apnar subscribed speed ta 24/7 consistent thake. Jodi speed kom mone hoy, helpline e janaben.
Night unlimited ba peak hour limit — eshob ISP Digital te applicable na. Apni din-raat jokhon ichcha full speed e use korte parben. Amra fair pricing e believe kori, sneaky limits e na!
Torrent, streaming, gaming — shob e apnar full speed paben ISP Digital te. Amra kono specific traffic type ke throttle ba limit kori na. Net neutrality te amra committed!
Extra data kinar dorkar nai ISP Digital te karon apnar plan e already unlimited data ache. Jodi speed beshi chai, plan upgrade korun — eta hobe better option!
Data usage alert ISP Digital app e set korte paren. Monthly usage er milestone e notification paben. Eta helpful track korar jonno, limit er jonno na — karon limit e nai!
Bandwidth cap kono ISP Digital plan e nai. Apni apnar plan er full speed e unlimited data enjoy korben month er prothom din theke shesh din porjonto. Simple, transparent, honest!
